title: The Rescue Mission for a Falling Telescope

scenes.text: A critical telescope is headed for a fall—can it be saved?
NASA is planning a daring mission to rescue a telescope that is falling back to Earth.
This telescope has provided vital data about our universe and could be lost forever.
Saving it means saving a wealth of knowledge about our cosmos!
scenes.label: SAVING KNOWLEDGE

scenes.text: Follow for daily science that blows your mind.

description: NASA is launching a daring mission to save a valuable telescope falling back to Earth—essential for our understanding of the universe. Follow for updates!
